ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of The Reserve
Off Calendar Jan-10-2022 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of The Reserve
Off Calendar Apr-12-2021 Continued To Sep-20-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Vern Adkins appeared by zoom for Boston Private Bank & Trust Co. (Administrator).

The Court stated that it had a chance to review this and that it appears Robert O'Haire hasn't cashed his check. Mr. Adkins stated that the Administrator issued a new check late last week, that he anticipates Mr. O'Haire cashing it and that he anticipates receiving a receipt. The Court noted that the letters show Peter Galbraith as the Administrator for the Estate of Alice Galbraith. Mr. Adkins stated that Alice's estate is in New Hampshire and that he filed a copy of the letters as an exhibit to the declaration of John Golden that was filed on February 5, 2021. The Court questions how much longer Mr. Adkins believes is necessary before the reserve will be distributed. Mr. Adkins stated that the Decedent did not file tax returns and that they have filed them, but they have not been able to get any confirmation from the IRS. Mr. Adkins also suggested a continuance six to twelve months out. Status of the reserve is continued to September 20, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of The Reserve
Off Calendar Feb-22-2021 Continued To Apr-12-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Vern Adkins appeared by zoom for Boston Private Bank (Petitioner).

The Court raised the issue of the direct payment to the Attorney without a Court order. Mr. Adkins stated that they will refund both the costs and fees to the estate and that they will not be requesting reimbursement. Mr. Adkins also stated that the Decedent had several unfiled tax returns, that it appears several of them are considered as filed, but there is one that is outstanding and that they need to do an additional return for 2020. In addition, Mr. Adkins stated that their intent is to make a partial distribution in the near future/the next month. Status of the reserve is continued to April 12, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
